title: Nightmare Rising
description: With each passing day, the more difficult the game becomes
body:
![Nightmare title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/42a164c8c5e61943b19d17f7359ff1fa5b1ba43d.png)

note:
If you notice that the modpack's performance is poor, I recommend desable Punchy, I may help.

###  The premise of this modpack is that the longer you spend in the game, new monsters will appear, and not only that, but their health and damage will increase in some cases. There are also random events in the world.

## How does it work?

Basically, there is a one-day grace period. Once that day has passed, the difficulty counter starts to increase as the days go by, reaching a maximum of 150. However, you can change the maximum difficulty and grace period when creating a new world.

![counter](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f60bd0aea0ed038d3179321f4850dc2ac2d0d472.png)
![max difficulty](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/88b8eb101c320963536dc0d104ef11bc48ca00d1.png)
